flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Illinois Central College rose 19% between 2017 and 2020 ($7.5k → $8.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Illinois Central College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4% → 0.0%).
